deals.title: Full cream milk 6 x 1L — member price
deals.tip: Swipe your WRewards card at checkout to unlock the member price. Add to your regular weekly shop to earn bonus Woolworths points on the promotion.

deals.title: Clover butter 500g — half price
deals.tip: Stack with your Checkers Xtra Savings card to earn bonus points. Buy two or three while it lasts — butter keeps well in the freezer.

deals.title: Chicken braai pack — per kg special
deals.tip: Swipe your Smart Shopper card to earn double points on this promotion. Available at all major stores — call ahead to confirm stock on Fridays.

deals.title: Add-on drink for R20 with any muffin or toasted sandwich
deals.tip: Choose a large hot beverage — the R20 flat rate applies to any size. Collect a stamp on your loyalty card to work towards a free muffin.

deals.title: Free kids meal every Tuesday for under-12s
deals.tip: One free kids meal per paying adult main meal. Dine-in only. Present the Wimpy family loyalty card for an extra birthday month benefit on top of this deal.

deals.title: Quarter chicken peri-peri for R65 on Mondays
deals.tip: In-store only on Mondays. Add a regular side for under R40 and keep the total meal under R110. Use the Nando's app to confirm your nearest store's participation.

deals.title: Free dozen original glazed doughnuts on your birthday
deals.tip: Register your birthday at least 30 days in advance on the Krispy Kreme website. Valid on your birthday only — bring your ID. The voucher arrives via email the morning of.

deals.title: Free birthday meal for Spur Family Card members
deals.tip: Register on the Spur app before your birthday month to activate the voucher. Valid for dine-in meals throughout the birthday month. Bring your loyalty card and ID.

deals.title: Free birthday drink — valid your entire birthday week
deals.tip: Download the Vida app and register your birthday at least 7 days in advance. Valid any day during your birthday week — choose the largest size for maximum value.

deals.title: 3 for the price of 2 on vitamins and supplements
deals.tip: Swipe your Clicks ClubCard — the discount applies automatically. Mix different supplements to cover your full health routine. The cheapest item is always the free one.

deals.title: Buy 2, get 1 free on selected skincare ranges
deals.tip: Cheapest item in the basket is free — mix participating brands for best value. Use your Benefit loyalty card to earn points on all three items purchased.

deals.title: 15% eBucks back on Woolworths Food — qualifying accounts
deals.tip: Requires FNB Gold account or higher with active eBucks enrolment. Monthly cap applies. Pay with your FNB card — linked savings debit qualifies, credit card earns more eBucks.

deals.title: 25% HealthyFood cashback at Woolworths Food
deals.tip: Stack with your WRewards points for double benefit. Swipe your Vitality card at checkout — not just your loyalty card. Focus spend on qualifying HealthyFood items for the full cashback.

deals.title: Free Entertainer membership with FNB Gold account and above
deals.tip: Book through the Entertainer app — not the restaurant directly. The 2-for-1 applies to the lower-priced main meal. Vouchers expire annually, so plan visits throughout the year.
